action.reasoning: Observation: Full replay training gave test average_accuracy=0.1411, but tasks 0,1=0.685/0.726 and all other tasks 0.0. Analysis: eval used best.pt, which was saved when model had only 20 output classes (after task 1) because that checkpoint achieved highest validation accuracy (val_acc uses limited output space). Later tasks added classes, lowering val_acc due to forgetting, so best.pt remained the early one. The model after task 9 (checkpoints/last.pt) has all 100 classes and was trained on all data, likely achieving high accuracy. Decision: Submit eval with checkpoints/last.pt to get test accuracy of the final model, then fix checkpoint selection logic (always save final as best.pt) and increase epochs for further gains.
